items.title: AI Is Moving up the Software Lifecycle: from Code Review to PRD Governance
items.original_summary: Technology companies are extending AI beyond code generation into earlier stages of the software lifecycle, including PRD validation, design inputs, and code review. Initiatives from Uber, DoorDash, and Cloudflare highlight a shift toward AI-driven governance layers that evaluate engineering artifacts before implementation while preserving human oversight across the development pipeline. By Leela Kumili
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 报道 AI 正在向上游移动：从代码审查扩展到 PRD 治理与设计输入环节。Uber、DoorDash、Cloudflare 等公司已建立 AI 驱动的治理层，在实施前评估工程产物。这是行业实践趋势综述，不涉及具体 SDK/API 字段变更，但提示团队可能需要引入 PRD 验证 agent。
items.backend_focus: 关注内部研发流水线：若已用 LLM 做代码审查（code review bot），可评估向上游扩展做 PRD validation；具体可参考 Cloudflare 与 Uber 公开的 prompt 与 RAG 方案，无需更换底层 model provider。

items.title: Microsoft Expands Azure Kubernetes Service with Bare Metal, Fleet Management and AI Infrastructure
items.original_summary: At this year's Microsoft Build 2026, Microsoft unveiled a broad set of enhancements to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) aimed at making Kubernetes a first-class platform for AI training, inference, and large-scale cloud-native applications. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: Microsoft 在 Build 2026 上扩展 Azure Kubernetes Service，新增 Bare Metal、Fleet Management 与 AI 基础设施能力。这是 AKS 平台层面的增强，相对此前以虚拟机为主的节点形态，这次引入裸金属节点以支撑 AI 训练/推理负载。AKS 用户可通过新 node pool 配置启用，不影响现有应用部署。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：在 AKS 上启用 Bare Metal node pool（az aks nodepool add --mode baremetal）以承载 GPU/AI 负载；Fleet Management 可用 hub-spoke 模式跨集群统一调度。检查现有 deployment 是否需要迁移到新 node pool，GPU 工作负载建议从 VM 节点迁出。

items.title: Apple Launches Core AI for Apple-Silicon Optimized On-Device Generative AI
items.original_summary: At WWDC 26, Apple announced the Core AI framework, the official successor to Core ML. It is designed to allow developers to run large language models and generative AI entirely on-device, supporting both custom-converted PyTorch models and pre-optimized open-source models. By Sergio De Simone
items.chinese_summary: Apple 在 WWDC 26 发布 Core AI 框架，作为 Core ML 的官方继任者，支持在 Apple Silicon 设备上完全本地运行 LLM 与生成式 AI，可加载 PyTorch 转出的自定义模型或预优化开源模型。这是设备端 AI 框架升级，相对此前的 Core ML，这次原生支持 LLM 而非仅小模型推理。Mac/iOS 应用可逐步从 Core ML 迁移到 Core AI。
items.backend_focus: 迁移路径：iOS/macOS 应用中的 Core ML（MLModel）调用逐步替换为 Core AI 框架，模型加载改用新的 Core AI model format（PyTorch 转换或预优化 .coreai 文件）；关注 NPU 加速 API（如 .generate 方法）与 token streaming 接口。旧 Core ML 模型仍可兼容加载，无需一次性切换。

items.title: CircleCI Introduces Chunk Sidecars to Bring CI Validation Directly into AI Coding Workflows
items.original_summary: CircleCI has launched Chunk Sidecars, a new capability designed to bring CI-style validation directly into an AI coding agent's inner development loop. By Craig Risi
items.chinese_summary: CircleCI 推出 Chunk Sidecars 功能，把 CI 验证直接嵌入 AI 编码 agent 的内部开发循环。相对此前 CI 仅在 PR 阶段触发，这次让 AI agent 在生成代码时即可调用 CI chunk 进行增量验证。这是 CI/CD 与 AI agent 集成的产品改进，影响使用 CircleCI 的团队工作流配置。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：在 .circleci/config.yml 中配置 chunk_sidecar 块，将 lint/test chunk 作为工具暴露给 AI coding agent（如 Cursor 或内部 Codex fork）；在 agent prompt 中允许其调用该 sidecar 工具。注意 CircleCI runner 版本需升级到支持 sidecar 的最新版本。

items.title: Article: Understanding ML Model Poisoning: How It Happens and How to Detect It
items.original_summary: In this article, the author explores data poisoning as a threat to machine learning systems, covering techniques such as label flipping, backdoors, clean-label poisoning, and gradient manipulation. The article reviews real-world incidents, discusses the challenges of detecting poisoned data, and presents practical defenses, tools, and operational practices for securing ML training pipelines. By Igor Maljkovic
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 发布长文解析 ML 模型投毒攻击，覆盖 label flipping、backdoor、clean-label poisoning 与 gradient manipulation 等技术，并给出实战案例与检测工具。这是安全科普与防御实践综述，不涉及具体 SDK 或模型 API 变更，但提示训练 pipeline 需要引入数据完整性校验。
items.backend_focus: 行动建议：在训练数据 pipeline 中加入数据来源签名（如 hash 校验）与异常分布检测（如 label 分布 KS-test），使用文中提到的工具（如 TensorFlow Data Validation）做训练前数据审查；fine-tuning 服务方需在数据集 ingest 阶段增加 provenance metadata 字段。

items.title: Article: Governing AI in the Cloud: a Practical Guide for Architects
items.original_summary: In this article, the author outlines a practical approach to AI governance in the cloud, covering discovery of shadow AI, data classification at creation, IAM-based enforcement, policy-as-code, and operational controls. The article shows how organizations can embed governance into delivery pipelines, balancing security, compliance, and developer productivity without relying on manual processes. By Dave Ward
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 发布云端 AI 治理实战指南，覆盖 shadow AI 发现、数据创建时分类、IAM 强制执行、policy-as-code 与运营控制。这是架构层面的治理方法论，不涉及具体 SDK/API 字段变更，但提示团队需要在 CI/CD 中嵌入 policy gate。
items.backend_focus: 行动建议：在 CI/CD pipeline 中加入 OPA/Conftest 做 policy-as-code 校验（如禁止向外部 LLM API 发送 PII 数据），在 IAM 层为每个 AI workload 创建专用 service account；数据创建侧接入自动 classification（如 Comprehend / 内部 classifier）打标签。

items.title: AI Coding Agents Get a Stack Overflow of Their Own
items.original_summary: Stack Overflow has announced Stack Overflow for Agents, a beta API-first knowledge exchange aimed at AI coding agents rather than human developers. The service is presented as a way to close what the company calls the Ephemeral Intelligence Gap, where agents repeatedly rediscover the same fixes and patterns in isolation instead of sharing them through a common memory. By Matt Saunders
items.chinese_summary: Stack Overflow 推出 Stack Overflow for Agents（beta），是面向 AI 编码 agent 的 API-first 知识交换服务，旨在解决 agent 重复发现相同修复的「短暂智能鸿沟」问题。这是第三方知识 API 新增，相对此前 Stack Overflow 仅服务人类开发者，这次提供 agent 专用 API endpoint。
items.backend_focus: 集成方式：在 AI coding agent 工具链中新增 Stack Overflow for Agents API 调用（REST endpoint 详见官方文档），建议作为兜底知识源接入；在 system prompt 中允许 agent 在本地知识库无结果时查询该 API。注意 beta 阶段有 rate limit，需配置 fallback。

items.title: Oracle's OpenJDK Bans Generative AI Contributions While Oracle's GraalVM Allows Them
items.original_summary: Two related, Oracle-backed projects published opposing policies on open-source contributions created with generative AI: the OpenJDK Governing Board approved an interim policy prohibiting such contributions, while the Coding Assistants policy from GraalVM permits them. Both projects require contributors to sign the same Oracle Contributor Agreement (OCA) for intellectual property. By Karsten Silz
items.chinese_summary: Oracle 旗下两个项目发布相反的 GenAI 贡献政策：OpenJDK Governing Board 批准临时政策禁止 GenAI 贡献，而 GraalVM 的 Coding Assistants 政策允许。两者都要求签署同一份 OCA。这是开源治理政策分歧，不涉及 API/SDK 字段变更，但对使用 LLM 生成 PR 的团队有直接影响。
items.backend_focus: 行动建议：若团队向上游 OpenJDK 提 PR，需关闭 LLM 辅助生成代码或完整披露 GenAI 使用；向 GraalVM 贡献则允许使用 Coding Assistants 协助。CI 中可加 pre-commit hook 自动在 commit message 中标注 GenAI 参与比例，避免无意中违反政策。

items.title: Celebrating 20 Years of InfoQ
items.original_summary: InfoQ celebrates its 20th anniversary. To mark the occasion, we have published a walk-through of the trends InfoQ called early, where they sit on the adoption curve today, and how that curve may evolve over the next decade. By InfoQ
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 庆祝成立 20 周年，发布对早期识别技术的回顾与采用曲线分析。这是媒体品牌纪念内容，不涉及任何 AI 模型、API 或 SDK 变更。与工程实施完全无关。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，团队无需任何行动。

items.title: Article: The Technology Adoption Curve, Twenty Years On
items.original_summary: Today, June 8th, InfoQ celebrates 20 years. This is not a comprehensive history, but a deliberately selective look at the technologies and practices InfoQ identified early, where they sit on the adoption curve in 2026, and how that curve may evolve over the next five to ten years. By Renato Losio, Dio Synodinos
items.chinese_summary: InfoQ 发布「技术采用曲线二十年回顾」长文，分析过去二十年技术趋势的演进路径。这是媒体行业回顾文章，不涉及具体 AI 模型版本、API 字段或 SDK 变更，对工程实施无直接指导意义。
items.backend_focus: 无。与工程无关，团队可选择性阅读以了解行业语境，但不需要任何代码或配置改动。
